-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A%09%22unicode%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09reader := bufio.NewReader(os.Stdin)%0A%0A%09texto, _ := reader.ReadString('%5Cn')%0A%09texto = strings.TrimSpace(texto)%0A%0A%09comando, _ := reader.ReadString('%5Cn')%0A%09comando = strings.TrimSpace(comando)%0A%0A%09if comando == %22M%22 %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(strings.ToUpper(texto))%0A%0A%09%7D else if comando == %22m%22 %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(strings.ToLower(texto))%0A%0A%09%7D else if comando == %22i%22 %7B%0A%0A%09%09for _, c := range texto %7B%0A%0A%09%09%09if unicode.IsUpper(c) %7B%0A%09%09%09%09fmt.Printf(%22%25c%22, unicode.ToLower(c))%0A%09%09%09%7D else if unicode.IsLower(c) %7B%0A%09%09%09%09fmt.Printf(%22%25c%22, unicode.ToUpper(c))%0A%09%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09%09fmt.Printf(%22%25c%22, c)%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09fmt.Println()%0A%0A%09%7D else if comando == %22p%22 %7B%0A%0A%09%09palavras := strings.Split(texto, %22 %22)%0A%0A%09%09for i := 0; i %3C len(palavras); i++ %7B%0A%0A%09%09%09p := palavras%5Bi%5D%0A%0A%09%09%09if len(p) == 1 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09palavras%5Bi%5D = strings.ToLower(p)%0A%09%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09%09palavras%5Bi%5D = strings.ToUpper(string(p%5B0%5D)) + strings.ToLower(p%5B1:%5D)%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09fmt.Println(strings.Join(palavras, %22 %22))%0A%09%7D
